overview: Alive and Well is a functional medicine clinic across three locations offering integrated care that combines clinical services with wellness treatments and spa services. The clinic provides personalized functional medicine, IV therapies, holistic treatments, pharmacy services, and supplements.
highlights: IV therapies including vitamin infusions, EBO2, chelation, and ozone IV
Wellness center with spa treatments and holistic therapies (infrared sauna, red light therapy, contrast therapy, colon hydrotherapy)
Full-service pharmacy with compounding and clinical-grade supplements; state-wide shipping available
targetAudience: Individuals seeking personalized functional medicine care with integrated wellness and spa services.
